examples: They are vital for sustaining life in some of the driest parts of the world.
Ardent supporters of public higher education know the importance of sustaining private higher education.
For all its success, the United States remains deeply hesitant about sustaining the research-university model.
Protected areas play an important role in conserving the biodiversity and thus sustaining rural livelihoods.
Alas, mature, or self-sustaining, are not yet words that anyone would use to describe this recovery.
